overview.description: Novel Agent - An AI-powered multi-agent collaborative novel writing system with knowledge base, real-time WebSocket communication, and comprehensive project management capabilities.

layers: Presentation Layer (FastAPI web interface with WebSocket support)
Business Logic Layer (Multi-agent coordination and novel generation workflows)
Data Access Layer (JSON file storage with knowledge base and project management)

key_components.name: Web Application Server
key_components.description: FastAPI application with RESTful API endpoints, WebSocket support for real-time updates, static file serving, and Jinja2 templating. Manages API settings, project CRUD operations, and agent coordination.

key_components.name: Multi-Agent System
key_components.description: Eight specialized agents (Worldbuilder, Outliner, ChapterWriter, Polisher, Evaluator, ContinuousWriter, Communicator, MessageBus) implementing the Coordinator-Worker pattern for collaborative novel generation.

key_components.name: Configuration Management
key_components.description: Pydantic-based configuration system with LLM defaults, API endpoints, writing configs, and server settings. Manages agent behaviors and API integration.

key_components.name: Data Persistence Layer
key_components.description: JSON-based storage system for agent configurations, global API settings, projects metadata, and trend statistics. Currently affected by settings persistence bug.

key_components.name: Knowledge Base System
key_components.description: Three-layer architecture (data/logic/application) with hybrid vector+keyword search, semantic chunking, and chapter management using ChromaDB.

key_components.name: Context Management
key_components.description: Manages character profiles, world-building settings, and narrative context throughout the writing process.

key_components.name: Utility Modules
key_components.description: Supporting utilities including caching, dashboard metrics, export functionality, logging, MCP management, retry logic, token statistics, and validators.

key_components.name: Project Manager
key_components.description: Handles project lifecycle operations including creation, loading, saving, and deletion of novel writing projects.

bugfix.title: Settings Persistence Bug - AGENT API Configuration Not Saving
bugfix.description: Global API configuration settings (api_base, api_key, model) are not persisting after page refresh. Settings are saved to .env file but frontend doesn't reload or validate persistence.

analysis_findings.potential_bug_cause: Frontend not reloading configuration after save, or config object not synchronized with .env file changes
